lineup_source: Japan recent squad / starting XI under Hajime Moriyasu (4-2-3-1)

players.name: Zion Suzuki
players.note: Born in Newark, USA, to a Ghanaian father and Japanese mother; raised in Japan.

players.name: Takehiro Tomiyasu
players.note: Born in Fukuoka; father a kendo fighter, mother a former track athlete, both Japanese.

players.name: Ko Itakura
players.note: Born in Yokohama; no foreign heritage documented, standard Japanese background.

players.name: Hiroki Ito
players.note: Born in Japan; no foreign heritage documented, standard Japanese background.

players.note: Born in Japan; no foreign heritage documented, standard Japanese background.

players.name: Ao Tanaka
players.note: Born in Japan; no foreign heritage documented, standard Japanese background.

players.name: Daichi Kamada
players.note: Born in Ehime; father Mikio was a former amateur defender, both parents Japanese.

players.name: Takefusa Kubo
players.note: Born in Kawasaki to Japanese parents Takefumi and Tamiko.

players.name: Ritsu Doan
players.note: Born in Amagasaki; no foreign heritage documented, standard Japanese background.

players.name: Daizen Maeda
players.note: Born in Osaka; father a veterinarian, mother an animal hospital worker, both Japanese.

players.name: Ayase Ueda
players.note: Born in Mito; father a former amateur footballer, both parents Japanese.
